Careers

Build technology that actually matters.

At AKnexis, you won’t be building feature #47 of a consumer app. You’ll be engineering the systems that run national businesses — and you’ll see the impact of your work directly.

Culture

How we work.

Excellence over volume

We do fewer things, better. Every engineer, strategist, and designer works on meaningful problems with real consequences.

Deep collaboration

No silos, no heroics. We work together across disciplines because the best solutions come from diverse thinking.

Long-term thinking

We invest in our people the same way we invest in our clients — for the long term, not just for the current sprint.

Flexible by design

Remote-first with optional in-person collaboration. We care about output and impact, not office hours.

Open Roles

Join the team.

Senior Full-Stack Engineer

EngineeringFull-time Remote (US)
Apply

Join our core engineering team building enterprise software platforms for national businesses. You'll architect, build, and deliver production systems that matter.

5+ years production full-stack experienceDeep knowledge of TypeScript, Node.js, ReactExperience with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)Strong opinions on system architecture

Technical Solutions Architect

ConsultingFull-time New York / Remote
Apply

Work directly with clients in the discovery phase to define technical architecture and solution design. Bridge business requirements and technical execution.

8+ years in enterprise software or consultingStrong communication with non-technical stakeholdersExperience with large-scale system designAbility to lead technical scoping sessions

Data Engineer & BI Analyst

Growth IntelligenceFull-time Remote (US)
Apply

Build data pipelines, warehouses, and dashboards that give our clients real insight into their business. Own the data infrastructure layer from ingestion to visualization.

4+ years in data engineering or analyticsStrong SQL, dbt, and warehouse tooling (Snowflake, BigQuery)Experience with BI platforms (Metabase, Looker, Tableau)Understanding of business analytics and KPI frameworks

Operations & Automation Consultant

Business FoundationFull-time Remote / Austin
Apply

Map client business processes, design automation strategies, and implement workflow systems. Help clients run operations that scale without adding headcount.

3+ years in business process consulting or ops rolesExperience with automation tools (Zapier, n8n, RPA)Systems integration knowledgeStrong process documentation skills

Engineering Internship — Summer 2026

EngineeringInternship Remote or San Francisco
Apply

A paid, meaningful internship program for students who want to work on real enterprise projects. Not a task-runner role — you'll contribute to production systems.

CS or related degree (junior or senior year)Working knowledge of TypeScript or PythonStrong communication and curiosityGenuine interest in enterprise software

Don’t see a perfect fit?

We occasionally hire exceptional people into roles we haven’t listed yet. If you’re genuinely excellent and believe in what we’re building, we want to hear from you.

Send an open application

Ready to build things that matter?

Apply for an open role or reach out directly. We'd love to hear from exceptional people.
